title: If This Be Sin
writer: Ben Simcoe, Margaret Kennedy, Ilya Surguchev
actors: Myrna Loy, Roger Livesey, Peggy Cummins
plot: A lonely wife of a workaholic husband on the magical Isle of Capri meets a charming and attractive young man. An exciting affair must end when word gets back to the husband and he becomes ill. Then the daughter enters the scene.
